name: United Community Banks Inc. Depositary Shares each representing 1/1000th interest in a share of Series I Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock
summary: United Community Banks Inc. Depositary Shares each representing 1/1000th interest in a share of Series I Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock represent ownership in a portion of the company's preferred stock. These depositary shares provide a claim on the dividends and assets of the underlying preferred stock. United Community Banks is headquartered in Blairsville, Georgia.
